name: subscriptions
title: Commerce Subscription API
description: This API is capable of recording and obtaining commerce subscription information

schema.title: Subscription Plan
schema.description: Resource representing a Subscription Plan that can be purchased by a customer. Supports free plans, fixed recurring pricing, and trial periods.

name.description: The reference key of the subscription plan. For GODADDY_APP plans, unique per applicationId.

displayName.description: The display name of the subscription plan shown to customers

description.description: Detailed description of what the subscription plan provides

status.description: The status of the subscription plan. E.g. ACTIVE, DRAFT, DEPRECATED, DISCONTINUED

billingReferenceId.description: The identifier for this plan in the external billing system used for checkout and payment processing. Today this is a Poynt Billing plan ID.

billingProvider.description: Identifies which external billing system the billingReferenceId belongs to. Acceptable values: POYNT_BILLING, GODADDY_ECOMM.

pricing.description: The pricing configuration for this plan. Uses pricingModel as a discriminator to determine the applicable pricing schema.
pricing.title: Pricing Model

oneOf.title: Free Pricing
oneOf.description: Pricing configuration for a free plan. No charge, entitlement only. No billing cycle, price, or trial fields are applicable.

oneOf.title: Fixed Recurring Pricing
oneOf.description: Pricing configuration for a fixed recurring plan. A fixed amount is charged on a recurring billing cycle.

billingCycle.description: The recurring interval at which the plan is billed.

price.description: The price for this plan. Value must be > 0.
price.title: Simple Money

value.description: The value, which might represent intergrals for currencies like `JPY` that are not typically fractional; or, with an implied decimal fraction for currencies like `TND` that are subdivided into thousandths. For the implied number of decimal places for a currency code, see [ISO-4217 Currency Codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217).

trialDays.description: Number of days the customer gets free access before the first charge. Payment info is collected upfront. Re-subscriptions skip the trial.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where this plan is available. Optional — if omitted, the plan is available in all countries. For country-specific pricing, create separate plans per country.

marketingData.description: Marketing information for the subscription plan

headline.description: Main marketing headline for the plan

features.description: List of marketing features to highlight

createdAt.description: The time (ISO-8601) at which the plan was created.

updatedAt.description: The time (ISO-8601) at which the plan was last updated.

error-details.title: Error Details
error-details.description: The error details. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

field.description: The field that caused the error. If the field is in the body, set this value to the JSON pointer to that field. Required for client-side errors.

value.description: The value of the field that caused the error.

location.description: The location of the field that caused the error. Value is `body`, `path`, or `query`.

issue.description: The unique fine-grained application-level error code.

description.description: The human-readable description for an issue. The description MAY change over the lifetime of an API, so clients MUST NOT depend on this value.

href.description: The complete target URL, or link, to use in combination with the method to make the related call, as defined by [RFC 6570 - URI Template](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6570), with the addition of the `$`, `(`, and `)` characters for pre-processing. The `href` is the key HATEOAS component that links a completed call with a subsequent call.

rel.description: The [link relation type](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-4), which is an identifier for a link that unambiguously describes the semantics of the link. For values, see [Link Relationship Types](https://www.iana.org/assignments/link-relations/link-relations.xhtml).

targetMediaType.description: The [RFC 2046-defined media type](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2046.txt) that describes the link target.

targetSchema.description: The schema that describes the link target.

method.description: The method to use to request the link target. For example, for HTTP, this might be `GET` or `DELETE`.

submissionMediaType.description: The media type with which to submit data with the request.

submissionSchema.description: The schema that describes the request data.

name.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

correlationId.description: Internal identifier used for correlation purposes.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

informationLink.description: The URI for detailed information related to this error for the developer.

details.description: An array of additional details about the error. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

items.title: Error Details
items.description: The error details. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

issue.description: The unique fine-grained application-level error code.

description.description: The human-readable description for an issue. The description MAY change over the lifetime of an API, so clients MUST NOT depend on this value.

links.description: An array of error-related HATEOAS links.

targetSchema.description: The schema that describes the link target.

endpoints.description: Retrieve the subscription plans by params

schema.description: The status of the subscription plan. E.g. ACTIVE, DRAFT, DEPRECATED, DISCONTINUED.

schema.title: Subscription Plan List
schema.description: Resource representing a list of subscription plans

items.description: Array containing the current page of subscription plans

items.title: Patch Request
items.description: An array of JSON patch objects to apply partial updates to resources.

items.title: Patch
items.description: The JSON patch object to apply partial updates to resources.

path.description: The JSON pointer to the target document location at which to complete the operation.

value.description: The value to apply. The `remove` operation does not require a value.

from.description: The JSON pointer to the target document location from which to move the value. Required for the `move` operation.

For the implied number of decimal places for a currency code, see [ISO-4217 Currency Codes](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217).

trialDays.description: Number of days the customer gets free access before the first charge. Payment info is collected upfront. Re-subscriptions skip the trial.

countryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code where this plan is available. Optional — if omitted, the plan is available in all countries. For country-specific pricing, create separate plans per country.

marketingData.description: Marketing information for the subscription plan

headline.description: Main marketing headline for the plan

features.description: List of marketing features to highlight

createdAt.description: The time (ISO-8601) at which the plan was created.

updatedAt.description: The time (ISO-8601) at which the plan was last updated.

error-details.title: Error Details
error-details.description: The error details. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

field.description: The field that caused the error. If the field is in the body, set this value to the JSON pointer to that field. Required for client-side errors.

value.description: The value of the field that caused the error.

location.description: The location of the field that caused the error. Value is `body`, `path`, or `query`.

issue.description: The unique fine-grained application-level error code.

description.description: The human-readable description for an issue. The description MAY change over the lifetime of an API, so clients MUST NOT depend on this value.

href.description: The complete target URL, or link, to use in combination with the method to make the related call, as defined by [RFC 6570 - URI Template](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6570), with the addition of the `$`, `(`, and `)` characters for pre-processing. The `href` is the key HATEOAS component that links a completed call with a subsequent call.

rel.description: The [link relation type](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-4), which is an identifier for a link that unambiguously describes the semantics of the link. For values, see [Link Relationship Types](https://www.iana.org/assignments/link-relations/link-relations.xhtml).

targetMediaType.description: The [RFC 2046-defined media type](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2046.txt) that describes the link target.

targetSchema.description: The schema that describes the link target.

method.description: The method to use to request the link target. For example, for HTTP, this might be `GET` or `DELETE`.

submissionMediaType.description: The media type with which to submit data with the request.

submissionSchema.description: The schema that describes the request data.

name.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

correlationId.description: Internal identifier used for correlation purposes.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

informationLink.description: The URI for detailed information related to this error for the developer.

details.description: An array of additional details about the error. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

description.description: The human-readable description for an issue. The description MAY change over the lifetime of an API, so clients MUST NOT depend on this value.

schema.title: Subscription
schema.description: Resource representing a Subscription that can be applied at Business or Store level

entitlementId.description: The identifier of the entitlement, if attached to one

subscriptionPlanRef.description: The reference key of the plan or product subscribed to

status.description: The status of the subscription. E.g. ACTIVE, PENDING, SUSPENDED, CANCELLED. Default is ACTIVE.

type.description: The type of the subscription. E.g. GODADDY_ECOMM, POYNT_BUNDLE, CUSTOM, GODADDY_APP

expiresAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription expires. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

createdAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription was created. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

updatedAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription was updated. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the subscription. Possible values are GODADDY_ECOMM, POYNT_BUNDLE, CUSTOM, GODADDY_APP.

schema.description: The type of the subscription. E.g. GODADDY_ECOMM, POYNT_BUNDLE, CUSTOM, GODADDY_APP. Default: GODADDY_ECOMM,POYNT_BUNDLE,CUSTOM

schema.title: Subscription List
schema.description: Resource representing a list of subscriptions

items.description: Array containing the current page of subscriptions

items.title: Subscription

updatedAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription was updated. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

totalItems.description: Total number of Subscriptions matching the search criteria. Returned only when totalRequired is set to true.

totalPages.description: Total number of pages matching the search criteria. Returned only when totalRequired is set to true.

links.description: Array of HATEOAS link relations that should be used to navigate across pages of Subscriptions

items.title: Error Details
items.description: The error details. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

field.description: The field that caused the error. If the field is in the body, set this value to the JSON pointer to that field. Required for client-side errors.

value.description: The value of the field that caused the error.

location.description: The location of the field that caused the error. Value is `body`, `path`, or `query`.

issue.description: The unique fine-grained application-level error code.

description.description: The human-readable description for an issue. The description MAY change over the lifetime of an API, so clients MUST NOT depend on this value.

links.description: An array of error-related HATEOAS links.

items.title: Link Description
items.description: A request-related [HATEOAS link](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-handrews-json-schema-hyperschema-02).

href.description: The complete target URL, or link, to use in combination with the method to make the related call, as defined by [RFC 6570 - URI Template](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6570), with the addition of the `$`, `(`, and `)` characters for pre-processing. The `href` is the key HATEOAS component that links a completed call with a subsequent call.

rel.description: The [link relation type](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-4), which is an identifier for a link that unambiguously describes the semantics of the link. For values, see [Link Relationship Types](https://www.iana.org/assignments/link-relations/link-relations.xhtml).

targetMediaType.description: The [RFC 2046-defined media type](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2046.txt) that describes the link target.

targetSchema.description: The schema that describes the link target.

method.description: The method to use to request the link target. For example, for HTTP, this might be `GET` or `DELETE`.

submissionMediaType.description: The media type with which to submit data with the request.

submissionSchema.description: The schema that describes the request data.

items.title: Patch Request
items.description: An array of JSON patch objects to apply partial updates to resources.

items.title: Patch
items.description: The JSON patch object to apply partial updates to resources.

path.description: The JSON pointer to the target document location at which to complete the operation.

value.description: The value to apply. The `remove` operation does not require a value.

from.description: The JSON pointer to the target document location from which to move the value. Required for the `move` operation.

schema.title: Subscription
schema.description: Resource representing a Subscription that can be applied at Business or Store level

entitlementId.description: The identifier of the entitlement, if attached to one

subscriptionPlanRef.description: The reference key of the plan or product subscribed to

status.description: The status of the subscription. E.g. ACTIVE, PENDING, SUSPENDED, CANCELLED. Default is ACTIVE.

type.description: The type of the subscription. E.g. GODADDY_ECOMM, POYNT_BUNDLE, CUSTOM, GODADDY_APP

expiresAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription expires. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

createdAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription was created. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

updatedAt.description: The time (in ISO-8601 format) at which the subscription was updated. E.g. 2014-09-11T23:14:44Z.

error-details.title: Error Details
error-details.description: The error details. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.

field.description: The field that caused the error. If the field is in the body, set this value to the JSON pointer to that field. Required for client-side errors.

value.description: The value of the field that caused the error.

location.description: The location of the field that caused the error. Value is `body`, `path`, or `query`.

issue.description: The unique fine-grained application-level error code.

description.description: The human-readable description for an issue. The description MAY change over the lifetime of an API, so clients MUST NOT depend on this value.

href.description: The complete target URL, or link, to use in combination with the method to make the related call, as defined by [RFC 6570 - URI Template](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc6570), with the addition of the `$`, `(`, and `)` characters for pre-processing. The `href` is the key HATEOAS component that links a completed call with a subsequent call.

rel.description: The [link relation type](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-4), which is an identifier for a link that unambiguously describes the semantics of the link. For values, see [Link Relationship Types](https://www.iana.org/assignments/link-relations/link-relations.xhtml).

targetMediaType.description: The [RFC 2046-defined media type](https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc2046.txt) that describes the link target.

targetSchema.description: The schema that describes the link target.

method.description: The method to use to request the link target. For example, for HTTP, this might be `GET` or `DELETE`.

submissionMediaType.description: The media type with which to submit data with the request.

submissionSchema.description: The schema that describes the request data.

name.description: The human-readable, unique name of the error.

correlationId.description: Internal identifier used for correlation purposes.

message.description: The message that describes the error.

informationLink.description: The URI for detailed information related to this error for the developer.

details.description: An array of additional details about the error. Required for client-side `4XX` errors.
